title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Guest Teacher
shortInfo: JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification released for 34 posts. Apply online from 27 May to 08 June 2026 through Website at www.jmi.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 34 PGT & TGT Posts
basic_details.short_information: JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification released for 34 posts. Apply online from 27 May to 08 June 2026 through Website at www.jmi.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with at least 50% marks and B.Ed. B.P.Ed, Diploma or B.El.Ed.
qualification.details: P.G.T. Political Science (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Hindi (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Mathematics (Senior Section): Master's degree in Mathematics from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate or Master's degree in Applied Mathematics and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. History (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Islamic Studies (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Arabic (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Urdu (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Economics (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Commerce (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. English (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Biology (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the concerned subject and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Physics (Senior Section): Master's degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in Physics/Electronics/Applied Physics/Nuclear Physics and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Sociology (Senior Section): Master's degree (MFA) from a recognized University in Art Education/Painting/Applied Arts with at least 50% marks and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. P.G.T. Fine Arts (Senior Section): Master's degree (MFA) from a recognized University in Art Education/Painting/Applied Arts with at least 50% marks and B.Ed. Degree or its equivalent from a recognized University. T.G.T. Urdu (Senior & Middle Section): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET Paper II qualified. T.G.T. Hindi (Senior Section): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET Paper II qualified. P.E.T. (Senior Section): University Degree with recognized Diploma in Physical Education or B.P.Ed. or equivalent qualification with 50% marks. T.G.T. Islamiat (Senior & Middle Section): B.A. (Hons) Islamic Studies or M.A. in Islamic Studies with 50% marks and B.Ed. or Alim/Fazil of any Madarsa recognized by JMI with Bachelor's degree and B.Ed. T.G.T. (Science) PCM (Senior & Middle Section): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET Paper II qualified. T.G.T. English (Middle Section): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET Paper II qualified. T.G.T. S.St. (Senior & Middle Section): Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in aggregate with any two of History, Geography, Economics, Political Science (one must be History or Geography) and B.Ed. and CTET Paper II qualified. Yoga (Middle Section): University Degree with recognized Diploma in Physical Education or B.P.Ed. or equivalent qualification with 50% marks. P.S.T. (Middle Section): Senior Secondary School Certificate with at least 50% marks and 2 year diploma in elementary education or 4 year bachelor of elementary education (B.El.Ed.) and CTET Paper I qualified. Nursery Teacher (Middle Section): Senior Secondary School Certificate with at least 50% marks and 2 year diploma in elementary education or Diploma/Certificate in Nursery Education/Training from recognized institute or B.Ed. Nursery. P.S.T. (Arts & Craft) (Middle Section): Five Years' recognized Diploma in drawing and Painting/Sculpture/Graphic Art or Equivalent recognized Degree.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for JMI Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for JMI Guest Teacher posts is 08-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Guest Teachers at JMI?
faq.answer: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) has announced a total of 34 vacancies for the Guest Teacher positions across various subjects.

faq.question: What is the application mode for JMI Guest Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally includes a Master's degree with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. degree or equivalent, with specific requirements varying by post.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for JMI Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia.

faq.question: What is the job type for these Guest Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The Guest Teacher positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110025.

faq.question: Are there any specific qualifications for PGT Physics?
faq.answer: Yes, for PGT Physics, a Master's degree in Physics/Electronics/Applied Physics/Nuclear Physics with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. degree is required.

seo_tags: Jamia Millia Islamia P.G.T. Political Science (Senior Section)
